title: ENHANCED COLOUR
description:
your Minecraft will change into more enhanced colour minecraft world
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
Are you bored with same boring Minecraft world?
This time i present you Minecraft [Enhanced Colour].
After applying this texture pack , your Minecraft will change into more enhanced colour minecraft world
with lighting effect.
all changed item will glow in night.

Basical this texture pack Enhanced the graphics in Minecraft

Changes Are:-

All trees will change into colourful trees:-

1)Acacia Tree
2)Azalea Tree
3)Birch Tree
4)Dark Oak Tree
5)Flower Azalea Tree
6)Jungle Tree
7)Mangrove Tree
8)Oak Tree
9)Spruce Tree

other changes:-

1)grass
2)tall grass
3)sea grass
4)kelp
5)saplings
6)wheat
7)wheat seed
8)ender eye
9)ender preal
10)alex skin
11)steve skin
12)beacon beam
13)all sculk items
14)all ores
15)end portal frame
16)nether portal
17)crying obsidian
18)dead bush
19)dripleaf
20)all moss items
21)both mushrooms
22)all veins
23)cobweb

environment changes:-

1)Sky
2)Sun
3)Moon
4)End Sky
5)Water
6)clouds

Some additional features:

1)Lower shield
2)Lower fire and soul fire
3)No blur pumpkin vision
4)under water vision

Enjoy the Minecraft [Enhanced Colour]

 

Thanks for downloading.
